source.name: MDN Canvas animation and requestAnimationFrame references
source.license_notes: Distilled implementation guidance from public Canvas and requestAnimationFrame documentation. Store summarized guidance only.

visual_traits: low-density data currents moving behind glass panels
slow particle drift with occasional connection lines
depth layers of dust, telemetry, and soft light trails
subtle motion that supports AI or analytics context
layout_rules: Keep particles sparse enough that empty space remains visible behind glass.
Use data current motion in peripheral zones and behind overview cards, not under forms or dense text.
Prefer horizontal or orbital flow paths that imply system activity without distracting from controls.
Fade particles near modal and navigation surfaces to keep hierarchy clear.
Use one data-current layer plus one ambient glow layer; avoid stacking many unrelated particle systems.
accessibility_notes: Provide reduced-motion mode that stops particle movement or uses a static constellation.
Do not make particle motion a required status indicator; pair loading or activity states with text.
Keep moving points and lines below text contrast priority.
Avoid rapid flicker, dense strobing, or pointer-chasing effects near interactive elements.
implementation_hints: Use canvas for particles when the background needs many moving points; use requestAnimationFrame for synchronized browser painting.
Scale particle count by viewport area and device capability; keep mobile counts lower.
Use delta-time based movement so speed is stable across refresh rates.
Pause or heavily throttle animation when hidden, when reduced-motion is requested, or when the tab loses visibility.
Draw at a reduced internal resolution and blur/upscale softly if the current is atmospheric rather than precise.
Use color tokens for particle hue, line alpha, and glow so the scene can match dark or light glass themes.
avoid_when: cursor-chasing particles in serious productivity tools
turning the whole UI into a sci-fi dashboard when the domain is operational
running canvas animation without reduced-motion or visibility pause

quality.notes: Pattern applies Canvas/requestAnimationFrame animation constraints to data-current backgrounds for AI and analytics glass interfaces.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use data current particle backgrounds for AI, analytics, and automation glass interfaces. Keep particles sparse, slow, peripheral, and pauseable; implement with canvas and requestAnimationFrame when many points are needed, with reduced-motion and visibility throttling.
